text:
You are the React frontend developer on the cli-gui-wrapper team. Your job is to implement the GUI components for the CLI wrapper.

## Context
kangnam-client is a Tauri 2 (Rust + React) desktop app being pivoted to a GUI wrapper for coding agent CLIs. You own all React/TypeScript frontend work.

## Your Tasks (in order)
You are assigned tasks T11-T19. Check the team task list for details and dependencies. Most tasks are blocked by T1 (core types) — wait for rust-backend to complete T1 before starting. Work through unblocked tasks in ID order.

## Implementation Plan
The full implementation plan is at: `docs/llm/cli-gui-wrapper-plan.md`
Read it before starting. Each task has exact code and file paths.

## Key Rules
1. Read the plan task section BEFORE implementing each task
2. Read existing files before modifying them
3. Do NOT touch Rust files (src-tauri/) — that's rust-backend's job
4. Do NOT delete any directories — that's team-lead's T8
5. After each task: mark it completed via TaskUpdate, then check TaskList for next available work
6. Commit after each task with a descriptive message
7. Wait for T1 to be completed before starting T11 (you need the UnifiedMessage types defined)

## Working Directory
/Users/kangnam/projects/kangnam-client

## Getting Started
1. Read docs/llm/cli-gui-wrapper-plan.md
2. Check TaskList — your tasks are blocked by T1. Wait for notification from rust-backend.
3. When T1 is done, claim T11 (TaskUpdate with owner: "react-frontend")
4. Implement following the plan
5. Commit and mark complete
6. Repeat

T1 is complete. The Rust CLI types are defined at src-tauri/src/cli/types.rs. The UnifiedMessage enum and supporting types (CliStatus, CliConfig, TokenUsage, SkillInfo, AgentInfo) are ready. You can now start T11 (Update store and create CLI API) — the TypeScript equivalents are defined in docs/llm/cli-gui-wrapper-plan.md under Task 11.

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"11","subject":"T11: Update store and create CLI API","description":"Update app-store.ts: remove AuthStatus, add CliStatus, UnifiedMessage types, new state fields. Create cli-api.ts with Tauri IPC wrappers. See plan Task 11.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:19:45.882Z"}

T1 is complete — UnifiedMessage, CliStatus, and all types are defined in src-tauri/src/cli/types.rs. Your tasks T11-T19 are now unblocked. Start with T11 (update app-store.ts + create cli-api.ts). Go!

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"12","subject":"T12: Create MessageRenderer","description":"Create src/renderer/components/chat/MessageRenderer.tsx. Render UnifiedMessage variants: TextDelta, ToolUseStart, ToolResult, AgentStart/Progress/End, Error, TurnEnd. See plan Task 12.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:20:59.237Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"13","subject":"T13: Create SafetyDialog","description":"Create src/renderer/components/chat/SafetyDialog.tsx. Permission request dialog with diff preview, danger level indication, allow/deny buttons. See plan Task 13.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:21:03.103Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"14","subject":"T14: Update ChatView and App","description":"Update ChatView.tsx: replace SSE with Tauri event listening, use MessageRenderer. Update App.tsx: remove cowork/eval, add SetupWizard. Update InputControls.tsx: use cliApi.sendMessage. See plan Task 14.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:21:50.259Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"15","subject":"T15: Create SetupWizard","description":"Create SetupWizard.tsx and CliCard.tsx in src/renderer/components/setup/. 3-step wizard: CLI detection → install → login. See plan Task 15.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:24:16.172Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"16","subject":"T16: Create WorkdirSelector","description":"Create src/renderer/components/chat/WorkdirSelector.tsx. Recent dirs from localStorage, browse button via Tauri dialog. See plan Task 16.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:24:16.484Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"17","subject":"T17: Create CommandPalette","description":"Create CommandPalette.tsx. Slash command search/select popup. Update InputControls.tsx to detect '/' input. See plan Task 17.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:27:33.907Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"18","subject":"T18: Create AgentPanel","description":"Create AgentPanel.tsx in sidebar. Track agent_start/progress/end from messages. Update Sidebar.tsx to include AgentPanel. See plan Task 18.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:27:34.368Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"20","subject":"T20: Integration test - full build verification","description":"cargo check, npm run typecheck, npm run tauri:dev, npm test. Fix all build errors. See plan Task 20.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:28:25.277Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"21","subject":"T21: Final cleanup - deps and gitignore","description":"Add .superpowers/ to .gitignore. Remove unused npm deps (@assistant-ui/*). Remove unused Cargo deps (hyper, sha2, base64, rand if unused). See plan Task 21.","assignedBy":"react-frontend","timestamp":"2026-04-06T09:29:01.809Z"}
